name: Conviva
description: Streaming and CTV attribution platform measuring audience engagement, ad performance and QoE across mobile video and OTT apps.

seo.title: Conviva — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Conviva: Streaming and CTV attribution platform measuring audience engagement, ad performance and QoE across mobile video and OTT apps.

when_to_use: CTV and OTT ad performance measurement for streaming publisher monetization
Audience engagement analytics for live and on-demand mobile video apps
QoE monitoring to correlate video playback quality with ad revenue impact
Cross-screen attribution for streaming platform ad campaigns

pros: Deep QoE and engagement metrics for streaming video
Strong OTT and CTV vantage point across publishers
Real-time issue detection for live events
Ad measurement tuned to video and streaming
review.verdict: Best-in-class for streaming QoE and ad measurement, but the wrong tool for standard app UA attribution.
review.best_for: OTT, CTV and streaming video publishers measuring ad engagement and quality of experience.
review.not_for: Non-video app marketers who just need install attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
